Headline: #39 Pershing Temporary Reroute near 39th/Ellis
ShortDescription: 39 Pershing buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions, due to street blockage near 39th/Ellis.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#39 Pershing buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions, due to street blockage near 39th/Ellis.

Eastbound buses will operate via 39th, Cottage Grove, 43rd, Oakenwald, and over normal route.

Westbound buses will operate via 42nd, Berkley, 43rd, Cottage Grove, Pershing, and over normal route.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #8 Halsted Temporary Southbound Reroute near Halsted/67th
ShortDescription: Southbound #8 Halsted buses are temporarily rerouted via  Halsted, 63rd, Morgan, 74th and Halsted: due to, street blockage near Halsted/67th.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Southbound #8 Halsted buses are temporarily rerouted via  Halsted, 63rd, Morgan, 74th and Halsted: due to, street blockage near Halsted/67th.

Northbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: Pink and Green Line Service Running with Delays
ShortDescription: Pink and Green Line trains are running with major delays Ashland/Lake due to signal problems.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Pink and Green Line trains are running with significant delays Ashland/Lake due to signal problems.

Shuttle buses have been requested to provide service in both directions and will conclude at 4:00pm:

Pink Line: Polk to Clark/Lake

Green Line: Harlem to Clark/Lake

Consider other service alternatives that may serve your trip, such as nearby bus routes or using buses to other rail lines.

Personnel are working to restore normal service. Allow extra travel time.

Headline: Yellow Line Service Delayed at Howard
ShortDescription: Yellow Line trains are running with delays at Howard due to track conditions.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Yellow Line trains are running with delays at Howard due to track conditions. 

Yellow Line will board/exit via track 2

At this time, also consider other service alternatives that may serve your trip, such as nearby bus routes, or using buses to other rail lines.

Personnel are working to restore service. Allow extra travel time.
